name: (Set of 2) 16" x 20" Leaf Framed Wall Art Set Natural - Threshold™: Botanical Drawing, Beige Frame, Vertical Display
description:
Add an artistic touch to any space with the (Set of 2) 16" x 20" Leaf Framed Wall Art Set Natural - Threshold™. With their medium tones and botanical designs, this wall art seamlessly integrates into various decor styles. Each piece has a sleek frame to enhance the aesthetic and allow the artwork to take center stage. Additionally, they come with D-rings to make hanging a breeze. The (Set of 2) 16" x 20" Leaf Framed Wall Art Set Natural - Threshold™ is a versatile and stylish choice for art enthusiasts.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
